description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD Premium Orange Nectar' with a realistic image of an orange on the front. The packaging is primarily white with gold and orange accents, and features both English and Arabic text. One side displays a barcode and FSC certification, while another side contains detailed nutritional information and ingredients. The top of the carton is sealed, with a small, flat closure that is not a traditional cap. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, designed for single-serve consumption and easy handling.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD Premium Orange Nectar' with an orange image and detailed product information.
description_view_0: Side view showing the barcode, FSC certification, and part of the product label.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' branding and a large orange image.
description_view_2: Side view with bold 'FARAGELLO' text and 'Premium Orange Nectar' in gold.
description_view_3: Back view featuring nutritional information, ingredients, and a small orange image.
